ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CVE_Enagement_Validation_Rules__c), Contact__c != null, Contact__r.AccountId != null, Contact__r.AccountId != CVE_Engagement__r.Account__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Contact's Account should match with CVE Engagement's Account.
